# About the Author {.unnumbered}

Paul Govan is a Senior Engineer at GE Aerospace with a Ph.D. in Civil Engineering from Texas A&M University. He is the developer of several open-source R packages including [AutoDeskR](https://github.com/paulgovan/AutoDeskR), BayesianNetwork, eAnalytics, and ReliaGrowR, and is a licensed Professional Engineer. More at [paulgovan.com](https://paulgovan.com).
